summary: REQ-1/2/3 appear largely implemented via a single-page App with a prominent "Click Me" button, immediate click-count/message feedback, and a consistent emerald/teal Tailwind theme. However, the diff introduces Internet Identity/auth plumbing and backend artifacts that were explicitly non-goals and also adds files in paths the BuildRequest said not to change.

hallucinated_features.description: Introduced Internet Identity authentication/provider and identity-aware actor hook despite authentication being a stated non-goal, and despite constraints to not modify files under these specific hook paths (files were added/introduced there).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly lists user authentication (Internet Identity) as a non-goal and also constrains changes to specific hook files/paths; the diff adds `useInternetIdentity.ts`, `useActor.ts`, and wires `InternetIdentityProvider` in `main.tsx`.

hallucinated_features.description: Added backend canister stub even though backend canister logic is a non-goal for this request.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly states backend canister logic or persistent storage are non-goals; diff adds a backend actor file.
